title: calceolaria umbellata
intro: Calceolaria umbellata, also known as the slipper flower, is a flowering plant species native to the Andes mountains in South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Calceolaria umbellata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote digestion. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
